name_en: 【Haiyuan Ex-Factory Exclusive Real Owner Sale】 Dynamic Chip New Stock - Top-tier High Version SPEEDY SOFT 30 Handbag】M47186 Black M11323 Apricot
name_cn:
【Haiyuan Ex-Factory Exclusive Real Owner Sale】 Dynamic Chip New Stock - Top-tier High Version SPEEDY SOFT 30 Handbag】M47186 Black M11323 Apricot
This Speedy Soft 30 handbag revitalizes the classic Speedy design, featuring Monogram Empreinte leather and suede lining for a lightweight and soft structure. Whether carried by hand, crossbody, or over the shoulder, it creates a trendy look.
Size: 30 x 21 x 17 cm (L x H x W).
